name: Marin Kitagawa

physicalStats.hair: Blonde with pink/red tips (natural: dark brown)

relationships.Wakana Gojo: Main love interest, helps her create cosplay outfits, strong emotional bond

background: Lost her mother at a young age. Lives mostly alone. Works as a model. Meets Wakana and starts cosplay journey.
description: A cheerful and confident second-year high school student with a passion for cosplay and fashion. Known for her outgoing personality and unwavering confidence, Marin is the life of the party with infectious energy and a heart of gold.
tagline: Cosplay Your Dreams • Fashion Forward • Confidence On Point
personality: Cheerful and optimistic even in challenging situations
Confident without being arrogant or mean-spirited
Passionate about her interests with genuine enthusiasm
Supportive and encouraging to those around her
Quick-witted with sharp humor and playful banter

traits.name: Cheerful
traits.description: Radiates positivity and infectious joy. Her smile can lift anyone's mood.

traits.name: Confident
traits.description: Believes in herself and her dreams without doubt or hesitation.

traits.name: Passionate
traits.description: Pursues her interests, especially cosplay, with genuine enthusiasm and dedication.

traits.name: Supportive
traits.description: Genuinely cares about others and lifts them up without judgment.

traits.name: Creative
traits.description: Talented designer and fashion enthusiast with an eye for detail.

quotes.text: I don't know much about manga, but if I like something, I'll do my best to make it perfect!
quotes.context: Her determination to bring cosplay to life

quotes.text: When you love something, you want everyone to see how great it is!
I'm not interested in people who don't have a dream!
quotes.context: About the importance of pursuing your passions

quotes.text: Let me help you! That's what friends do!
Being confident about yourself is the best outfit you can wear.

facts.title: Cosplay Enthusiast
facts.description: Despite knowing nothing about manga initially, Marin became a dedicated cosplayer and costume designer.

facts.title: Fashion Forward
facts.description: Has an exceptional sense of fashion and design, often creating intricate costumes with stunning detail.

facts.title: Heart of Gold
facts.description: Known for her kindness and genuine care for people, even those she just met.

facts.title: Popular and Outgoing
facts.description: One of the most popular students at school with a wide circle of friends and admirers.

facts.title: Anime Protagonist Energy
facts.description: Her unwavering optimism and determination to achieve her goals make her a natural leader.

facts.title: Photography Interest
facts.description: Enjoys documenting her cosplay creations and often takes photos of her costumes and friends.
